easy.title: Flexbox Navigation Bar
easy.description: Create a responsive navigation bar using Flexbox. The nav should have a logo on the left and links on the right. On mobile, the links should stack vertically under the logo.
easy.starterCode: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"><title>Flex Nav</title><style>/* Add styles */</style></head><body><header><nav><!-- Logo and links --></nav></header></body></html>
easy.solution:
MySite
  • Home
  • About
  • Services
  • Contact

Flexbox Nav Demo

medium.title: CSS Grid Photo Gallery
medium.description: Create a responsive photo gallery using CSS Grid. Use auto-fit/minmax for responsiveness. Include a hover effect with a caption overlay. The gallery should have 8+ items.
medium.starterCode: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"><title>Photo Gallery</title><style>/* Grid gallery styles */</style></head><body><section class="gallery"><!-- Gallery items --></section></body></html>

hard.title: Full Responsive Page with Holy Grail Layout
hard.description: Build a complete page using CSS Grid for the Holy Grail layout. Include header, nav, main content, aside, and footer. On mobile, all sections should stack vertically. Use media queries for tablet (show nav and aside as narrow columns) and desktop (full Holy Grail).
hard.starterCode: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"><title>Holy Grail Layout</title><style>/* Grid layout */</style></head><body><!-- Header, Nav, Main, Aside, Footer --></body></html>
